subcodes.first_line: O servant! Your letter hath come before Our presence, and We have understood that which was therein, and verily God is the All-Knowing of what lieth within thy heart [3.5s]... ...And now concerning thy reference to the existence of two Gods. Beware, beware, lest thou be led to join partners with the Lord, thy God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و عرفنا بما فیه و کان الله علی ما فی قلبک علیما
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital
